creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to King John from comment #6)
Please take care about tabs in Makefile!

What do you think these method: https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book/#using-go
You can generate GH_TUPLE (into Makefile) and overwrite the rpmdb version and doesn't need any patch and messages.
I would prefer it.
